title: VolunteerReport
description: Structured volunteer incident triage report classified from raw text.

report_id.description: Unique identifier for this volunteer report.

raw_text.description: Original text submitted by the volunteer.

detected_language.description: Detected ISO 639-1 language code of the raw text.

zone_id.description: Resolved zone ID corresponding to the venue model, or null if unclear or not mentioned.

structured_summary.description: A clean one-sentence summary in English for operations staff.

generated_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the report was processed.
